title: Removal of legacy v2 Mail Send endpoint
raw_changelog: The legacy v2 Mail Send endpoint (POST /api/mail.send.json) will be removed on June 1, 2026.
before_text:
## Mail Send Endpoints

### v3 (Recommended)
POST /v3/mail/send

### v2 (Legacy)
POST /api/mail.send.json

Both endpoints are fully supported.
after_text:
## Mail Send Endpoints

### v3 (Required)
POST /v3/mail/send

### v2 (DEPRECATED - Removed June 1, 2026)
~~POST /api/mail.send.json~~

**Migration Required:** All users must migrate to v3 before June 1, 2026. The v2 endpoint will return 410 Gone after this date.

+

ground_truth.breaking_reason: v2 endpoint being removed entirely. All v2 users will get 410 Gone responses.
ground_truth.action_required: Migrate from v2 to v3 Mail Send endpoint before June 1, 2026.
